name: jsql-syntax
description: SQL + Jinja2 syntax highlighting for JSql query patterns in Python

enumDescriptions: Dracula — cyan keywords, pink functions, green strings
Monokai — red keywords, green functions, yellow strings
One Dark — purple keywords, blue functions, green strings
jsqlSyntax.theme.description: Color theme for JSql syntax highlighting

jsqlSyntax.tableDefinitionFiles.description: Workspace-relative glob patterns for Python model files such as tables.py. Parsed __tablename__ and sa.Column definitions are used to color known SQL tables and columns.

jsqlSyntax.schemaSources.description: Named schema sources. Each key is a name (e.g. "liblms"), value is an array of workspace-relative glob patterns pointing to table definition files.

jsqlSyntax.prefixMappings.description: Maps directory prefixes to schema source names. Files under a prefix will only see tables from the mapped source.

prefix.description: Workspace-relative directory prefix or **/name glob, e.g. "src/applms" or "**/applms"

source.description: Name of a schema source defined in jsqlSyntax.schemaSources

jsqlSyntax.semanticWarnings.description: Enable schema-aware SQL warnings for unknown tables and invalid qualified columns using the loaded table definition files.
